name: apropos
description: apropos — find commands by keyword. Search for Unix commands and tools available on this system. Answer questions like 'what commands are available for X', 'find commands for sorting', 'list tools for encryption', 'which utilities handle archives'. Searches manual page names and descriptions for a keyword and returns matching commands, one per line, as 'command(section) - description'. Equivalent to 'man -k'. Case-insensitive. Use when you need to discover what commands exist, find a tool for a task, list available utilities for a category (networking, compression, text processing, image manipulation, encryption, printing, diff), or find alternatives to a known tool.

input.description: No standard input required. The first argument is the search keyword or regular expression.

output.description: Matching commands, one per line, formatted as 'command(section) - short description'. Returns nothing if no commands match.
